title: Coalition still works together after airBaltic loan discussion
summary_full: The coalition partners have agreed to continue working together in the government, Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) announced on April 16 following a meeting with coalition parties, during which disagreements regarding the granting of a loan to the airline airBaltic were dealt with.
